name: Desktop Audio Visualizer
short_description: Desktop Audio Visualizer is a Lightweight audio visualization software.It can always dock on the screen and translucent without affecting your work.
detailed_description:
Desktop Audio Visualizer is a Lightweight audio visualization software.It can always dock on the screen and translucent without affecting your work.

FEATURES

  • Support all sound sources on the system, including music players, games, etc.
  • Visualizer support many customization options.
  • It is displayed at the front of the screen and is always visible but without affecting your game and work.
  • Support theme presets, one-click switching.
  • Very low resource usage.
  • Can be used with other Steam app.
